'''âth-ch-r''' ('''kathachar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outact|outact]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outact|outact]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-ch-r
|-
! Lemma
| kathachar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithachar|thithachar]] || [[word:jithachar|jithachar]] || [[word:shithachar|shithachar]] || [[word:kithachar|kithachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthachar|thuthuthachar]] || [[word:jujuthachar|jujuthachar]] || [[word:shushuthachar|shushuthachar]] || [[word:kukuthachar|kukuthachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthachar|thuthachar]] || [[word:juthachar|juthachar]] || [[word:shuthachar|shuthachar]] || [[word:kuthachar|kuthachar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthachar|thuthachar]] || [[word:juthachar|juthachar]] || [[word:shuthachar|shuthachar]] || [[word:kuthachar|kuthachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethachar|thethachar]] || [[word:jethachar|jethachar]] || [[word:shethachar|shethachar]] || [[word:kethachar|kethachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothachar|thothothachar]] || [[word:jojothachar|jojothachar]] || [[word:shoshothachar|shoshothachar]] || [[word:kokothachar|kokothachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothachar|thothachar]] || [[word:jothachar|jothachar]] || [[word:shothachar|shothachar]] || [[word:kothachar|kothachar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothachar|thothachar]] || [[word:jothachar|jothachar]] || [[word:shothachar|shothachar]] || [[word:kothachar|kothachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthachar|thĂŠthachar]] || [[word:jĂŠthachar|jĂŠthachar]] || [[word:shĂŠthachar|shĂŠthachar]] || [[word:kĂŠthachar|kĂŠthachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathachar|thathathachar]] || [[word:jajathachar|jajathachar]] || [[word:shashathachar|shashathachar]] || [[word:kakathachar|kakathachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathachar|thathachar]] || [[word:jathachar|jathachar]] || [[word:shathachar|shathachar]] || [[word:kathachar|kathachar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathachar|thathachar]] || [[word:jathachar|jathachar]] || [[word:shathachar|shathachar]] || [[word:kathachar|kathachar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathachar|shathachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathachar|goshathachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathachar|gokishathachar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathacharnĂŒ|shathacharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathacharnknĂŒ|goshathacharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathacharnĂŒ|gokishathacharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathacharshĂ«|shathacharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathacharnkshĂ«|goshathacharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathacharshĂ«|gokishathacharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathacharo|shathacharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathacharnkro|goshathacharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathacharo|gokishathacharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathacharmu|shathacharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathacharnkmu|goshathacharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathacharmu|gokishathacharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathacharsher|shathacharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathacharnksher|goshathacharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathacharsher|gokishathacharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathacharng|shathacharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathacharnkng|goshathacharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathacharng|gokishathacharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathacharya|shathacharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathacharnkya|goshathacharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathacharya|gokishathacharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathacharyam|shathacharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathacharnkyam|goshathacharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathacharyam|gokishathacharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathacharnĂŒshĂ«|shathacharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathacharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathacharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathacharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathacharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathacharnĂŒro|shathacharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathacharnknĂŒro|goshathacharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathacharnĂŒro|gokishathacharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathacharnĂŒmu|shathacharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathacharnknĂŒmu|goshathacharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathacharnĂŒmu|gokishathacharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathacharshĂ«nĂŒ|shathacharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathacharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathacharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathacharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathacharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathacharshĂ«ro|shathacharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathacharnkshĂ«ro|goshathacharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathacharshĂ«ro|gokishathacharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathacharshĂ«mu|shathacharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathacharnkshĂ«mu|goshathacharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathacharshĂ«mu|gokishathacharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathacharonĂŒ|shathacharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathacharnkronĂŒ|goshathacharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathacharonĂŒ|gokishathacharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathacharoshĂ«|shathacharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathacharnkroshĂ«|goshathacharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathacharoshĂ«|gokishathacharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathacharomu|shathacharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathacharnkromu|goshathacharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathacharomu|gokishathacharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathacharmunĂŒ|shathacharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathacharnkmunĂŒ|goshathacharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathacharmunĂŒ|gokishathacharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathacharmushĂ«|shathacharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathacharnkmushĂ«|goshathacharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathacharmushĂ«|gokishathacharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathacharmuro|shathacharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathacharnkmuro|goshathacharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathacharmuro|gokishathacharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
